notes: I had to "Force the use of a specific Steam play compatibility tool" (a new Steam beta feature) in the game properties since the game has a broken Linux repository. After doing that, the game is downloaded and installed and works perfectly.
title: Alicia Quatermain 2: The Stone of Fate

notes: Finished the game without issues. Need to manually force proton since there is an empty linux depot but that's not really proton related.
